subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast strung the pearls of praise unto God! The Desired One's presence at the pole of the circle of existence hath raised His standard [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من نظم عقود لئالی الثناء علی الله حضرت مقصود در قطب دائره وجود لواء معقود
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @growth of the Cause, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
